title: Call: Which of the following best describes a European call option?...
summary: Analyze call option properties, pricing, or payoff structure.
prompt: Which of the following best describes a European call option?

options.text: A European call option can only be exercised at expiration, contrasting with

solution: A European call option can only be exercised at expiration, contrasting with American options that can be exercised at any time before expiration.
